notes:
What's new in V3.1.0:
• ✂️ Story Cutter now inserts a rough cut directly into your Premiere timeline
• 🧠 New models: Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Gemini 3.1 Pro now available
• 🎬 Blackmagic RAW and pro camera profiles now supported
• 🎥 Kling Motion Control updated to version 3
• 🛠 Bug fixes, better error messages, and smoother performance across the board
